race.comment: ESPRIT DU JOUR (4) peaks off a nose defeat over 1200m at Eagle Farm in a 65 against her own sex. Just missed at Ipswich prior and with a 2kg claim is well placed to be winning for the premier metro yard. RUBAAHY (5) brought good form from this track to Ipswich but found a CL5 a bit of a stretch. Held her numbers and is a quinella hope with average luck in the run. PORRISTA (3) led and just missed here this grade over 1200m in a blanket finish. Has switched yards and been freshened and kept up to the mark with a Sunshine Coast trial placing. The 2kg claimer can skip her over and ride the speed, and her best form measures up. SHE'S BRUTAL (9) resumes and won first-up last time in work over 1200m at this track. Likely to be ready and is in the mix. LAVONI (7) is a second-up winner, and her early form would see her around the mark.
